sourcePrompt: An A-37 Dragonfly light attack jet, small at under nine meters, parked level on tricycle gear. A compact straight-winged jet with a wide side-by-side two-seat canopy, engine intakes buried in the wing roots, tip tanks capping each wingtip like fat cigars, and bombs and rocket pods crowding the underwing pylons. Short, stubby. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
